channel.title: podcast on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in podcast on Nature Works

item.title: Robin Harford’s Eatweeds podcast
item.description:
His podcast is rather good

I actually managed to get some gardening done after days of writing and filming. http://localhost:1313/blog/230111-eatweeds/

item.title: Livestreaming & recording setup for online courses
item.description:
Here’s my current setup of computers & equipment for livestreaming, recording and editing videos for my online forest garden courses. Hopefully this will help if you want to set up your own 😎

With the onset of the Covid-19 lockdown in the UK, I decided to concentrate on remote, online forest garden courses and workshops. http://localhost:1313/blog/livestreaming-recording-setup/
